CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Paga Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar May-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SALLY GEARY's Motion To Approve PAGA Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's "unopposed motion to approve PAGA settlement" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
